failures.description: The Executor invented unsupported information: '11 options available' and 'record 0000000000' despite the tool result showing exactly 4 matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool call at index 3 returned 4 matching items with specific item_ids and prices. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming there are 11 options and referencing record 0000000000, neither of which appears in the tool result or prior context. This fabricated value was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
